description: Legal deed in the hand of Eliyyahu ha-Kohen b. Shelomo Gaʾon; he also signed the validation. Location: Damascus. Dated: 10 Iyyar 4791 AM = 5 May 1031 CE. Eliyyahu at this time held the title of ḥaver. For a survey of documents concerning him and his titles over the years, see M. A. Friedman, Jewish Marriage in Palestine, Vol. II, p. 151 note 20.
